tools.name: list_niches
tools.description: List all available service directories in the LocalPro network. This is the starting point for discovering what categories of verified local service providers are available. Categories include water damage restoration, foundation repair, crawl space repair, basement waterproofing, mold/asbestos/lead

tools.name: list_cities
tools.description: List available cities and metro areas where verified providers operate for a given niche. Use this to discover valid city slugs before calling search_providers. Cities are grouped by metro area where applicable (e.g. "minneapolis-mn" covers Minneapolis, St. Paul, and surrounding suburbs). Optionally

tools.name: list_service_types
tools.description: List the valid service type categories for a given niche directory. Use this before calling search_providers with a service_type filter to ensure you pass a valid value. Each niche has its own taxonomy — for example, "coated-local" has epoxy, polyaspartic, metallic_epoxy, etc., while "radon-local" h

tools.name: search_providers
tools.description: Search for verified local service providers across 10 trade categories: water damage restoration, foundation/slab repair, crawl space repair, basement waterproofing, mold/asbestos/lead remediation, radon mitigation, septic services, commercial electrical, floor coating (epoxy/polyaspartic), and laun

tools.name: get_provider
tools.description: Get a detailed summary of a specific verified service provider. Returns business description, services, pricing summary, coverage area, service details, and a link to the full profile page. With a valid API key (X-API-Key header): also returns full pricing breakdown and certifications. Without a key

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_cities" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: List available cities and metro areas where verified providers operate for a given niche. Use this to discover valid city slugs before calling search_providers.…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_service_types" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: List the valid service type categories for a given niche directory. Use this before calling search_providers with a service_type filter to ensure you pass a val…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_providers, get_provider · Private data: search_providers, get_provider · Public sink: get_provider.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_providers, get_provider · Private data: search_providers, get_provider · Public sink: get_provider

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
